decisions.briefing: Markets are essentially flat today with the S&P 500 down 0.1% and NASDAQ down 0.2% — a mild consolidation session with no strong directional catalyst. Cash sits at $477.14, just below the $500 threshold that would trigger new position sizing, so I'm holding steady with all six current positions rather than forcing a thin buy. The top screener candidates (BHVN, QNT, FDS, NOW) remain strong and are being watched for entry if a profit-target exit replenishes cash.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted marginally lower on light volume, with both the S&P 500 and NASDAQ posting sub-0.2% declines — a classic low-conviction consolidation day. No major economic data releases or Federal Reserve commentary drove the move, leaving traders in a holding pattern ahead of upcoming macro data. Sector rotation was muted and the narrow trading range suggests neither bulls nor bears are pressing their hand today.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日於低成交量下小幅回落，標普500及那斯達克指數跌幅均不足0.2%，呈典型的低信念整固走勢。市場缺乏重大經濟數據或聯儲局訊號推動，投資者普遍按兵不動，靜待後續宏觀指引。各板塊輪動平靜，全日於窄幅區間橫行，多空雙方均未有積極出擊。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag is the performance penalty a portfolio suffers by holding uninvested cash. Because cash earns near-zero return while the market trends upward over time, sitting on idle funds pulls down your returns relative to a fully-invested benchmark like VOO. Today the portfolio holds $477 in cash with four open slots — a reminder that while waiting for the right entry is sometimes smart, cash always has an opportunity cost.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」是指持有未投資現金對組合表現造成的損耗。由於現金回報接近零，而市場長期趨勢向上，閒置資金會令你的收益落後於如VOO般全倉投入的基準指數。今日組合持有477美元現金及四個空置槽位，提醒我們：等待適合的入市時機固然重要，但閒置資金始終有其機會成本。
